title: Acianthera monophylla
taxonomy: Acianthera monophylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Acianthera, which is part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae. This species is native to South America and is known for its unique characteristics and growth habits. The classification of Acianthera monophylla reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared traits with other species in the same family. As a member of the Orchidaceae family, Acianthera monophylla is a type of orchid.
benefits: Acianthera monophylla is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, but limited research is available on its health benefits.
